COUNSEL INDICATED THAT THE PARTIES HAD AGREED ON EIGHT DOCUMENTS TO BE SEALED AND WILL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM THAT SPECIFIES WHICH DOCUMENTS ARE TO BE SEALED.

Notice Of Joint Motion To Seal The Entire Record
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF FARIDA UDAIPURWALA'S Joint Motion To Seal The Entire Record, MATTER TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 302 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE GIORGI ON THE SAME DAY AND AT THE SAME TIME. JUDGE BUSCH RECUSES HIMSELF. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Ntc Of Joint Motion To Seal The Entire Record
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: JOINT MOTION TO SEAL THE ENTIRE RECORD.
Appearances: Frank J. Martin of Standard Pacific Capital (439.7439) for defendants; Geoffrey T. Holtz of Bingham McCutchen LLP (393.2390) for plaintiff.
Discussed and the court rules as follows: grant based on counsels' stipulation of which documents are to be sealed. Counsel indicated that the parties had agreed on eight documents to be sealed and will submit a proposed order that is approved as to form that specifies which documents are to be sealed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
